mnemonics.title: Thread Like a Race Track Lane
mnemonics.content: Think of a 'Thread' like a 'Race Track Lane'. Multiple lanes (threads) let runners (tasks) race simultaneously without waiting for each other to finish.

mnemonics.title: Runnable Interface
mnemonics.content: Remember 'R-U-N-N-A-B-L-E': Run Unique New Nations And Bring Logical Execution
